title: laurentia irasuensis
side_effects: Laurentia irasuensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to increased heart rate, dizziness, and nausea. Improper use may also result in interactions with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, which can exacerbate underlying health conditions. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid potential side effects.
